name: Blank Character Template
description:
Hello gooners!

This is the blank template I use for my bots, I decided to share it incase it might help someone!

I have stolen countless lines of this template from so many other botmakers, mainly from Iorveth's Bot Creation Guide and Mikale's Bot Optimization Guide, but I physically cannot credit everyone since 99% of this is stolen from all over the place. Feel free to steal this yourself, Lord knows I've already stolen most of it.

Keep in mind this is supposed to be as exhaustive as possible, 90% of the time you do not need half the stuff in this template so just delete the lines you won't use.

I do sometimes update this as a Iearn more stuff and make "better" bots.
creator: Remington1218
